---
title: "\'Adelaide and her Godson\'"
---

## \'Adelaide and her Godson\'
**Date:** 1857
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (February -June 1857)

### Notes

Whoever the author of this tale was, he or she was evidently unknown to CMY and her associates, because the editor of <i>MP</i> advertised for his or her address in the February 1857 issue which carried the first instalment.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
